Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT DALE LOUGHINS' Motion For Order Vacating Default And Default Judgment is off calendar as moot. The relief was granted ex parte on July 3, 2013. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
